dsl_rule.translation_notes: Translated n-period channel breakout using Donchian Channel indicators. dc_upper represents the maximum close over past n periods (default 20), and dc_lower represents the minimum over past 10 periods for exit. Exit condition includes time-based exit via hold_days_max=15 bars. Signal is LONG-only based on entry condition (price breaks above channel maximum). Volume threshold of 0 percentile indicates no volume filter applied.

backtest_rule.reason: Translated n-period channel breakout using Donchian Channel indicators. dc_upper represents the maximum close over past n periods (default 20), and dc_lower represents the minimum over past 10 periods for exit. Exit condition includes time-based exit via hold_days_max=15 bars. Signal is LONG-only based on entry condition (price breaks above channel maximum). Volume threshold of 0 percentile indicates no volume filter applied.

source_rule_text: Enter a long position when price breaks above the maximum value of a lookback channel; the simplicity and effectiveness of channel breakouts makes them viable as a core trend-following mechanism.
